7 I 5

Applying to 11001011
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 C 0n = NOT(1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 I 0 = 1
3 I 1 = 1
4 I 2 = 0
5 I 3 = 0
6 I 4 = 1
7 I 5 = 0

\boxed{00110010}
